description: A small metal ball, 10 cm in diameter, that creates a portal that is 5” x 10” to another dangerous realm, full of anomalous entities and objects unless provided with a high voltage current, preferably 10,000 watts or higher.
containment: With copper poles, charge with a constant 10,000 watts of electricity. Provided by the engine fueled by high octane racing fuel from NACA-005

addendums.text: NACA-005 was left unpowered for over 30 seconds due to the fuel running out without anybody's knowledge. NACA-008 was then discovered spreading only days later, and NACA-007 was also discovered. Though its presumed that 007’s discovery was a coincidence.
